text:
"シーチキン(Sea-Chicken)" is popular "Canned Tuna" in Japan.
Its food texture is like chicken meat, so named as "Sea-Chicken".
Almost Japanese are surprised at this sponsor spot in 1978.
Of course this is parody of StarWars.  XD
